# Microsoft Copilot Studio Release Notes

Microsoft Copilot Studio is a tool for creating and maintaining copilots.

A copilot is an AI-powered conversational interface based on large language models (LLMs) and additional sources of knowledge.

## Release timelines

Releases happen frequently, and the list is updated throughout the month as features reach worldwide availability.

## Version releases

| Version |
| --- |
| 2507.1 |

## Worldwide availability

| Month |
| --- |
| September - 2024 |
| August - 2024 |

Note: Page updated 2026-04-09 (source updated_at). The released versions page shows limited recent entries; detailed release notes available per-month on the What's New page.

Updated: 2026-04-10
